_meta.author: ravikatiyar162
_meta.title: Feature Spotlight
_meta.description:
Feature Spotlight
A responsive section component designed to highlight a key product feature. It juxtaposes a detailed text description, including a pre-header, main heading, and call-to-action, with a dynamic visual element. The component includes subtle, continuous animations on floating images to draw user attention and add a modern feel. It is fully theme-adaptive, using shadcn/ui variables for colors and styling.
